scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "pnpm --filter eventchimp-frontend dev" "pnpm --filter eventchimp-backend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter eventchimp-frontend build && pnpm --filter eventchimp-backend build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter eventchimp-frontend typecheck && pnpm --filter eventchimp-backend typecheck
